case_title: TANYA WELLS VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-23-2014 CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-16-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-23-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-21-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-01-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-15-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-04-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-16-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JUL-15-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS, TANYA SERVED FEB-11-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
